description.ko: 유기적 식물학과 첨단 회로의 매혹적인 융합인 FLORA-9은 실리콘 덩굴이 네온 에너지와 데이터 스트림으로 박동하는 디지털 진화의 정점을 나타냅니다.
description.en: A mesmerizing fusion of organic botany and advanced circuitry, FLORA-9 represents the pinnacle of digital evolution where silicon vines pulse with neon energy and data streams.

prompt: A macro cinematic shot of FLORA-9, a futuristic cybernetic flower, translucent crystalline petals with glowing fiber-optic veins, holographic pollen floating in the air, deep forest background with digital glitches, hyper-realistic, 8k, neon bioluminescence, iridescent textures, intricate electronic components integrated into the stem.
